case_title: MARA KUGELMAS VS. PICNIC GROUP CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-19-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-30-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-10-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
